entry.title: Re: TWD decimal point issue
entry.content:
Hello @dlistunov if a currency is not maintained in table TCURX by default 2 decimals applicable on same you can check EUR/USD/GBP etc also not maintained if you want to follow for some currency other than 2 decimals you need to maintain same in TCURX table with decimals 3, 4 or 5.

Regards,
Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content:
Hi @MalgoMas, 
Our SAP expert @omar-sharaf  recommended to access the Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition learning journey where you also find the corresponding certification: SAP Certified Specialist - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.
This certification exam validates that the candidate possesses the core knowledge required to support SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. It is designed for the Implementation Consultant & Project Manager who needs to prove that he/she has an overall understanding and in-depth skills of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and can participate in his/her role as a member of an implementation project. This is an entry level certification.
Please note: To prepare for this certification, it is necessary to take the Learning Journey Exploring SAP Cloud ERP in addition to the Learning Journey displayed under "How to Prepare."

However, casting a look at the underlying content Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology is essential for a better understanding of the learning journey above.

Kind regards
Margit

 

Thank you,

Omar

entry.title: Re: SAP Web IDE (Personal Edition) - Problem connecting t...

entry.title: Re: Withholding tax not calculated in a SD invoice

Hello @Manuel_Castilla could you please check pricing procedure for sales order/billing document & validate base is maintained for TWES condition with necessary requirement type if applicable in Spain.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: how do you schedule story reports to users ?
entry.content:
#story reports #people analytics

I'm working on scheduling a story report for the user. They receive the link, but when they click on it, the report center opens without any visible download option. Should I be using the legacy distribute tool to schedule the story report instead?

 

Thanks

Archie

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
@David_Chaviano:

My name is Bill (Bill8). I am new to this group. I am a SAP Basis professional. I am unemployed for a few years now. I feel I am so far behind and need to catch up with technology. I would like to start learning again but don’t have a means to do it.

I am classified as all of the below:

  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
  • First generation college students
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
  • People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves.

I would appreciate an opportunity to be awarded for free certification attempts from the digital skills initiative.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Method 'CREATE_STREAM' not implemented in data provid...
entry.content:
amo_ry

I'm facing the same problem, did you manage to solve it?

entry.title: [Sap Commerce cloud] basic authentication for SOAP webservices
entry.content:
We have some SOAP webservices and we want configure the basic authentication for these. The extention that contain all the resources is XYZ.

I added the XYZ-spring-security-config.xml into WEB-INF/config folder and I included into XYZ-web-spring.xml the tag import for read it. I'm sure that the security xml is correctly read because I put the '<debug />' tag and on the logs appear the warning log lines.

this is the configuration that I wrote for cover all the ws endpoints:

	<debug />
	<security:http pattern="/ws/**"
		use-expressions="true"
		authentication-manager-ref="wsAuthenticationManager">

		<security:http-basic />
		<security:intercept-url pattern="/ws/**"
			access="isAuthenticated()" method="POST" />
	</security:http>

	<security:authentication-manager
		id="wsAuthenticationManager" alias="wsAuthenticationManager">
		<security:authentication-provider>
			<security:user-service>
				<security:user name="admin" password="admin"
					authorities="ROLE_ADMIN" />
			</security:user-service>
		</security:authentication-provider>
	</security:authentication-manager>

If I broke the config xml (with wrong syntax or unknown/undefined tags) the web services doesn't work. If the xml is (apparently) correct the webservices works fine but the credential are ignored (and with correct, wrong or simply missing user-password) my application receive the message and return a 200 to client.

What wrong?

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

thank you, ere we are only discussing localizations for Germany, India, and Mexico. What needs to be done for Italy?

entry.title: Error when editing a record in CAP app
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I created an app using CAP that reads the data from an existing table from HANA Cloud and created a service based on that table. I followed the below tutorial link to create the app and also to create the table in HANA cloud.

Build an SAP CAP Application to Access SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Relational Engine | SAP Tutorials

On top of this, I enabled the transactional ability for the entity to perform CRUD operation. Create, read and delete works well. But, when I tried to edit existing record, I get an error saying "Entity is locked". I don't have anything in the draft table or any entity which is locked and I am not sure why it is saying like this. I have attached the screenshots. Can you help me resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Siva

entry.title: In Learning.SAP do we have any courses for SAP Advanced Workflow?
Re: Change length of column in table in SAP BTP ABAP environment gives ATC error Length of filed cha
entry.content:
Hi Kir,

if you need further assistance and error analysis, we kindly ask you to create a customer ticket using component BC-DWB-DIC-AC

Please provide us all relevant details and if relevant also access to your customer system.

Kind regards,

Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: Can Azure AD be used in SAP Task Center config in pla...
entry.content:
Task center uses Identity_Authentication_Connectivity_IDS destination as mentioned in the page https://help.sap.com/docs/task-center/sap-task-center/identity-directory-connectivity to get the required user details and need to configure this destination with IAS information, no other identity directory is mentioned here. So the API may be designed to pull the details from IAS only, but it may work if other Identity Directory works through same configuration/API.

Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: Can you delete a G/L account in Quality System S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hello @Marcus_Raisch check below thread. Hope this helps.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/deleting-gl-accounts/qaq-p/5897005

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding Transition, Guidance, and Lessons Learned from Previous Projects
entry.content:
In a recent webinar Onboarding Transition, Guidance, and Lessons Learned from Previous Projects, hosted on Tuesday, 1st October 2024, SAP SuccessFactors Consultants Angela Romano and Alejandro Azcárate discussed the critical insights on transitioning from SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0 to Onboarding 2.0.

The webinar highlighted the key features released in H1 2024 for SAP SuccessFactors ONB 2.0 that further improve user experience, data integration, and process efficiency.

The discussion then emphasized how the transition is not a simple "lift-and-shift", but an opportunity to rethink and optimize your onboarding processes for greater efficiency and engagement.

Key takeaways include:

  • Data Quality & Integration: The new onboarding system shares the same data model as Employee Central, ensuring seamless data quality and reducing the need for redundant mappings.
  • Enhanced UI & Mobile Experience: The new user interface is simplified, offering real-time data access and a more intuitive experience for both HR and employees, including mobile functionality for managers.
  • Efficiency Gains: Automating tasks like managing pending hires and reviewing personal data ensures faster and more accurate completion of processes, particularly helpful for industries like retail that require quick hiring cycles.

Why Now is the Right Time for Transition? SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0 set to be deprecated by 2026, starting your transition now allows you to refresh your processes while leveraging the latest onboarding features that drive productivity, employee engagement, and smoother integrations with third-party systems.

SAP SuccessFactors Services can help to support your transition, we offer a Transition Advisory and Implementation Service designed to guide you through the complexities of this upgrade. Whether you need a complete implementation or advisory support, our team is equipped with flexible service options tailored to your needs.

Ready to future-proof your onboarding process? Get in touch with our Expert today: Angela Romano angela.romano@sap.com and ensure a smooth transition to the next generation of onboarding

Additional materials:

Webinar Recording

Slides Shared during the webinar

Transition Advisory and Implementation Service Summary

Continuous Quality Check for customers currently engaged SAP Partners

entry.title: Re: Change length of column in table in SAP BTP ABAP envi...
entry.content: just go ahead to release the transport. nothing to panic I believe.

entry.title: Where can I start learning to develop and run apps on SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Developing Applications on SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime learning journey

Overview
This Learning Journey introduces you into all important aspects to develop and run apps on SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime.

Learning objectives
Upon completing this learning journey, developers will be able to efficiently develop, run, and manage cloud-native applications on SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Runtime. They will learn best practices for designing applications and applying advanced deployment strategies. Additionally, developers will gain skills in networking and routing, observability and monitoring, scaling, and handling updates. They will also explore advanced techniques in UI development, application sizing, security, resilience, and AI integration.

Prerequisites

Recommended:

  • Discovering SAP Business Technology Platform
  • Confident Handling of command line tools
  • General familiarity with software development and microservice patterns

Mandator:

  • Managing Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP TM Strategy to determine vehicle resource.
entry.content:
Hello Rogerio,

Thank you very much for this post, very interesting. I have one question, are you sure that you assigd the strategy to the FU type ? I'm saying this because normally the resource is determined at FO creation, so I was thinking that it should be assigned to FO type no ? or maybe it's like determined somehow in a table at FU creation level, then copied into FO ?

Thank you !

entry.title: Re: SAP Task Center setup for S/4HANA On-Premise
entry.content:
Task center uses Identity_Authentication_Connectivity_IDS destination as mentioned in the page https://help.sap.com/docs/task-center/sap-task-center/identity-directory-connectivity to get the required user details and need to configure this destination with IAS information, no other identity directory is mentioned here. So the API may be designed to pull the details from IAS only, but it may work if other Identity Directory works through same configuration/API.

Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

Thank you for this incredible opportunity. As a woman from a visible minority in my geographic location, I aim to boost my career and am highly motivated to expand my skills by working on innovative projects. Currently a material and production planner, I have a strong interest in new technologies, and what I appreciate most about SAP is its continuous evolution to meet customer needs and embrace innovation. I am truly excited to be part of this SAP digital skills initiative.

I am looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thank you

Alida

entry.title: Settlement to AUC is showing wrong values
entry.content:
During periodic settlement of WBS to AUC the settlement entries are not showing correct values and expected. The expected value of settlement should match with the Actual Balances for the current period 9 which is in CJI3 (Actual Cost Line-Item Report)

The settlement entries from WBS to AUC are behaving as below:

Cost booked on Level 5 WBS lets say is 100 dollars

AUC is at level 1 WBS

Running CJB2 and then running CJ88 settles the cost correctly to AUC with 100 dollars.

CJI3 shows correctly as the total cost of the project is 0

Original posting with debit/credit indicator as "D" and the settlement posting as "O"

When we reverse the settlement the cost comes back to AUC with a debit/credit indicator as "D"

1. Original journal entry + 100 dollar debit to WBS with Dr/Cr indicator "D"

2. Settlement entry - 100 dollar credit to WBS with Dr/Cr indicator "O"

3. Settlement Reversal + 100 dollar debit to WBS with Dr/Cr indicator "D"

When we settle again the cost is wrongly taken as + 200 dollar and is omitting the entry of the previous settlement. What can be the reason for this?

So every time we are reversing and settling the values again the cost is wrong and is piling up

entry.title: Internal error (3998) occurred [Message 131-183] when adding document in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,

We update a test company we had for SAP B1 v10 with a backup of the live one so we could use it as a sandbox for some things we wanted to test but when trying to create documents in this test company (sales orders, business partners, warehouses etc) we are getting the error: Internal error (3998) occurred [Message 131-183].

After restoring the database we performed the "refresh database user" in the SLD. That database user seems to have all the correct permissions the the SQL server, as compared with the users of other databases.

Any ideas as to what might be causing this?

Thank you.

Spyros

entry.title: Re: Parallel multicast to broadcast messages to multiple...
entry.content: I take that back, "Send" step can't be used to broadcast message parallelly. I did however use parallel Multicast with 2 receivers, made the first receiver fail and successfully received message in the second receiver. Is it behaving differently for you?

entry.title: Why Identity Access Governance is not available/found in SAP Discovery Center?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

For some reason, I am unable to search for Identity Access Governance in SAP Discovery Center? Why? 

 

 

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: Re: Red/Yellow Flags of Stock Room Management Compatibili...
entry.content: Thanks Dominik for your valuable pointers. While I am happy for us to do this and we did succeed getting a green for the red in a test system, just assessing the effort of doing this for some 10 locations (warehouses) that we have makes me wonder on the cost of testing all the processes before we put the changes in Production. Conversely, I wonder what may be the repercussion of not doing that and saving ourselves the investment of time/effort especially knowing very clearly that we are NOT using any of the components in our business operations. Are we obliged to turn these into green from SAP audit point of view, I wonder. Thanks again very much for your help.

entry.title: Account determination error for pricing element in a service order
entry.content:
Hello, experts,

We are configuring the service module for S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, and running tests with service orders using advanced execution (MSO1).

Due to process requirements, we need to add some price conditions in the service order, as shown below:

However, when we try to save the order, we encounter the following error:

This error occurs for each price condition. The sales organization mentioned in the error is actually the one we created during the configuration of the service organizational unit, and in the SPRO transaction, we have already assigned this sales organization for services to the respective sales organization in sales (SD):

Additionally, in transaction VKOA, the account determination has been set up for the sales organization of SD (1002). How can we configure the system so that the account determination considers the sales organization (SD) instead of the service organization?

I would greatly appreciate any assistance with this issue.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
David Avila.

entry.title: Re: Calling Custom Adobe form in ABAP On Cloud (Embedded Steampunk)
entry.content:
Hi @mohnishlunkad 

I kept investigating this issue. It seems this development needs 2 Odata Services to be called: 1st Get an OAuth2 Token and 2nd Call the Adobe Form and send it the token.

You can find further information from the following Blog Post:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/generate-pdf-forms-in-s-4-hana-public-cloud-developer-extensibility-using/bc-p/13891203#M169636 

Unfortunately, I havent' had a chance to try it out since I'm in a hurry completing some other developments.

I hope it helps.

Regards.

entry.title: How to Configure Gmail and Office 365 for Email Notifications Sent by the Alert Service
entry.content:
In this article, we walk you through examples of the required configuration steps using Google Gmail or Microsoft Office 365 as the mail server for automated email notifications sent by the Alert Service in SAP Digital Manufacturing, but you can use other products.

Introduction

The Alert Service in SAP Digital Manufacturing aims to notify production operators or supervisors about events or exceptions happening on the shop floor and intentionally introduce human decision making when responding to them. Alerts can either be created manually within Production Operator Dashboards (PODs) or automatically by production processes. Alerts contain configurable data fields (also known as alert properties) which include the context information that led to the creation of the alert. For example, they can contain information such as plant, work center, resource, operation, material, SFC, order, or readings from sensors connected via shopfloor systems or MQTT brokers. The alert service can be configured to send out in-app and/or email notifications to a list of recipients upon alert generation, status or processor change. For more information about the alert service and some example end-to-end scenarios, please refer to my earlier blogs Create an Issue in SAP Quality Issue Resolution from an Alert in SAP Digital Manufacturing, Enriching Readings from MQTT Sensors with the Applicable Manufacturing Context, the Alerts section of the Application Help for Execution and the Enabling Alert Services section of the Operations Guide for SAP Digital Manufacturing in the SAP Help Portal.

Before the alert service can send out email notifications, some configuration is required as outlined in the Configure Email Notifications section of the Operations Guide for SAP Digital Manufacturing. In this context, however, it is important to know that service providers often have specific requirements for port settings and two-factor authentication to access the SMTP server. Therefore, I’ll explain the configuration in more detail along the two examples of Gmail and Office 365 so that you can avoid some of the pitfalls and have the relevant links to the documentation of the two service providers at hand. Hopefully, these examples will help you while setting up the alert service for email notifications.

 

Using Gmail for Email Notifications

Start with setting up a destination in the SAP BTP Cockpit with the following values:

Property Name

Property Value

Notes

Name

SAP_DM_NOTIFICATIONS_MAIL

 

Type

Mail

 

Proxy Type

Internet

 

Authentication

BasicAuthentication

 

User

 

Gmail email address

Password

 

"App password" created in Gmail
as explained below

mail.smtp.host

smtp.gmail.com

 

mail.smtp.port

587

 

mail.transport.protocol

smtp

 

mail.smtp.from

 

Gmail email address

mail.smtp.starttls.enable

true

 

In Gmail, execute the following two steps as explained in the respective links:

  1. Turn on 2-Step Verification on the Gmail account.

  2. Create an app password from your Gmail account. This password is required in the destination configuration in SAP BTP Cockpit.

 

Using Office 365 for Email Notifications

Start with setting up a destination in the SAP BTP Cockpit with the following values:

 

Property Name

Property Value

Notes

Name

SAP_DM_NOTIFICATIONS_MAIL

 

Type

Mail

 

Proxy Type

Internet

 

Authentication

OAuth2JWTBearer

 

Client ID

 

Set up an app registration in Azure. The client id is provided by this app registration as explained below.

Client Secret

 

Create a secret in the app registration and use the secret value here as explained below.

Token Service URL

https://login.microsoftonline.com/<O365-tenant-id>/oauth2/v2.0/token

This is the URL to fetch OAuth2 tokens for Office 365. You need your Office 365 tenant ID.

mail.smtp.host

smtp.office365.com

 

mail.smtp.port

587

 

mail.transport.protocol

smtp

 

mail.smtp.from

 

This is the email address of the user in Office 365 that is used for sending.
This value, along with the token, is used to authenticate to the Office 365 mail server.

mail.smtp.auth.mechanisms

XOAUTH2

This property forces the authentication to the mail server to use
XOauth2 protocol as documented in this article section of Microsoft Learn.

mail.smtp.oauth.scope

https://outlook.office365.com/.default

This property is needed when the token provider requires "scope" as a parameter to
be included in the request to create a token. For Office 365, the value should be set to https://outlook.office365.com/.default
For more details, see this article section in Microsoft Learn.

The screenshot below displays a destination configured for Office 365. You need to provide proper values from "Client ID", "Client Secret", "Token Service URL", and "mail.smtp.from".

The remaining steps of the configuration are all done in Office 365:

  1. Create an App Registration in Azure or Microsoft Entra: The app registration is used to provide the client ID and client secret for OAuth2 authentication. For more information, see this article section in Microsoft Learn. 

  2. Create a Client Secret for App Registration: Create a secret for the App Registration from the previous section. Note that only client secrets are currently supported and mTLS isn't supported. The client ID and secret are required in the destination configuration in SAP BTP Cockpit. For more information, see this article section in Microsoft Learn. 

  3. Add Required Permission to App Registration: Add the following permission to the app registration: Office 365 Exchange Online → SMTP.SendAsApp
    This permission configuration is completed in the Applications → Enterprise Applications section of Microsoft Entra.

    The screenshot below shows the app registration "SMTP-send" granted the required permission. For more information, see this article section in Microsoft Learn. 
  4. Grant Tenant Admin Consent in Azure: The tenant admin has to provide consent to the permission change done in the previous step. For more information, see this article section in Microsoft Learn. When you have a single tenant in Office 365, you can accomplish this by choosing the "Grant admin consent" button above the permission list. For more information, see this article section in Microsoft Learn.

  5. Add the User used to Send Mail to the App Registration: Identify a technical user to be used as the mail account to send email notifications. This user needs to be added to the app registration. The below screenshot shows a technical user called "Technical user" added to the app registration "SMTP-send" with the user role.
  6. Add the App Registration to Exchange Online: This step requires the use of Exchange online PowerShell. For more information, see this article section in Microsoft Learn.

  7. Provide the Mailbox Permission to App Registration in the User Account for Sending Emails: For more information, again, see this article section in Microsoft Learn. 

  8. Ensure that "Authenticated SMTP" is Enabled for the User Account: In the Microsoft 365 Online Admin center, open the active users and select the user account used to send emails. On the "Mail" tab, ensure that "All apps allowed" is under the Email Apps section. By default, "Authenticated SMTP" isn't selected, but it is required.

This completes the required configurations steps for Office 365.

entry.title: Re: RV80HGEN
entry.content: I Have faced same situation, Usually RV80HGEN  needs to be added automatically in TR, but in my case it did not, so when i move th TR to quality system, it create issues on dependent programs, even running RV80HGEN  manually in quality system also doesn't work, the best thing is to add RV80HGEN   this manually in transport

entry.title: Re: Exposed SAP S/4HANA Federated content in SAP Workzone give Internal Server Error
entry.content: that is nothing better, check network tab to find detail information.

entry.title: Sequencing/Scheduling with user defined fields in S4 PPDS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Need help to understand which is the feasible options to consider below mentioned scheduling/sequencing scenario

We have a scenario where we do sequencing of order based on user defined fields that do not appear on the sort list.

 

1. Work with routing classification - 018 Class type (Without Block planning)

For this we wanted to use Routing classification at operation level by defining the user defined attributes as characteristics in this routing class. But we do not want to use this routing classification for Block planning. We want to use these characteristics for a time continuous resource sequencing. Please let us know if this is a feasible approach.

 

2. Consider Routing operation User field Key:

Also apart from the above option we are also considering usage of routing operation user field keys to define these attributes as user fields. And use the CIF BAPIs to send these user defined fields to PPDS and make them populate them at order level and add them in the sort list of sequencing heuristics.

 

3. Use Material Mater Characteristics - Material Class:

Use Material classification by defining the user defined attributes as characteristics in material class. CIF these relevant characteristics to PPDS and make them populate at Order level and add them in the sort list of sequencing heuristics

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

My name is Nguyen Thi Thuy Dung and I'm 23 years old.

I am newly-graduate who's trying to shift her career trajectory and being immensely interested in SAP. I have just finished the learning journey "Creating Processes and Automations with SAP Build Process Automation". I want to become certified with SAP and take on my professional journey. In the future, I’m eager to connect with the community, learn from experienced SAP professionals.

Here the completion picture of the learning journey:

 

I hope that you will consider my request.

Thanks
Nguyen Thi Thuy Dung

entry.title: Text association creating new column
entry.content:
I create a new CDS view to field as semantic text:

define view entity zt001 as select from t001
{
  key bukrs,
      @Semantics.text: true
      butxt
}

 

After that, i created a CDS view to expose data with text association:

define view entity ztest as select from t001
  association [0..1] to zt001 as _zt001 on $projection.bukrs = _zt001.bukrs
{
    @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 10 }]
    @ObjectModel.text.association: '_zt001'
    key bukrs,
    _zt001
}

 

When i execute it, the extra column with description of company code is generated:

 

I try to remove association at end of CDS ztest, but the text association doesn't work in this case.

How can i remove this column "Company name"?

I know in SWIA transaction PFTC I can acess the task. My example is about Purchasing Order Release:

We need changes this text:

But in PFTC transaction we only can see: 

And Description lab is empty.

My question is: How can I change the text:

Thanks a lot.

Msotago

Madhu KAINIKKARA.

entry.title: Re: A Practical Guide to Naming iFlows in SAP Cloud Integration (SCI)
entry.content:
Hi @NareshDasika18,

this naming convention is meant for multi tier environment, where you have separated tenant for dev/test and prod.

For customers, which do have only one tenant (used both as dev/test and prod) we add letter T or P after SCI. So my example 

SCI00200150_IN_VeloCorp_HTTP_SFTP_OrderRequest

will become

SCIT00200150_IN_VeloCorp_HTTP_SFTP_OrderRequest

or 

SCIP00200150_IN_VeloCorp_HTTP_SFTP_OrderRequest

Mind the 4th character T or P. In that case we also maintain two packages for each project one for test and one for prod. Same with endpoints on Sender adapters (like http).

entry.title: CDS Datasource for data extraction
entry.content:
Currently in S4 HANA, we use standard CDS data source for data extraction to SAP BW. We can create custom CDS data source using custom CDS app key user extension but that has limitations. How do we create custom CDS data source for extraction in SAP BW for achieving clean core using developer extension?

Currently, the annotation for CDS data extraction is not released for cloud. Are we supposed to create a service as a workaround and Is the annotation planned to be released for cloud in future versions? What is the workaround for this case?

entry.title: Re: Audio recording in web app
entry.content: Can you provide the full UI and flow logic?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: while coding 😊

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP: Unspecified provider error occurred. See Er...
entry.content: Thanks for the class, had a similar issue with V4 and the class CL_DSP_PROCESS_ENGINE helped me to trace back to READ method in Behavior Implementation. Code in Read method was commented by mistake, hence the same error.

entry.title: Re: SAP NetWeaver 7.52 SP Abort execution because of Step returns modlib.jslib.caughtException
entry.content:
Yo tuve el mismo problema y era por la contrasena, estaba colocando todo en minusculas, lo que hice fue crear la contrasena al menos con una letra mayuscula y un numero.

I had the same problem and the reason was the bad password, the password must contain at least 1 capital letter and 1 number, for example Asdf1234

entry.title: Re: SAP NetWeaver 7.52 SP Abort execution because of Step...
entry.content: I had the same problem and the reason was the bad password, for example type the password as Asdf1234, Capital letter and number.

entry.title: Re: Scan a directory on application server with LONG file names
entry.content:
I had problems with both RZL_READ_DIR_LOCAL and EPS2_GET_DIRECTORY_LISTING.

RZL_READ_DIR_LOCAL returns only 32 characters, and EPS2_GET_DIRECTORY_LISTING has authorization issues.

I was able to solve this by using CL_FILE_UTIL=>readdir, as per Note 3273137

entry.title: Re: Using EPPM projects created before the change in acco...
entry.content: We are working on an answer

entry.title: Re: Batch number not getting copied in Return order
entry.content:
So you are creating a Return Order with reference to Billing Document and Batch number is not copied. The reason is in the Invoice you only have main Item. 

This mean the Batch Items are not available in the Invoice and when Return Order is created, main item from Invoice is referred. obviously the Batch number will not be available in Returns Order, unless you have Batch Items in the Invoice and they are referred while creating Returns Order. 

If you do not want to change the process, only option would be to have a Custom Copy Control routine which will fetch the Batch number from Delivery Document (via Table VBFA). However what would happen incase there are multiple Batch items for one Main Item?

entry.title: Re: The Header Material item category is not changing to...
entry.content:
Hi,

Steps I followed.

1. In CJ20n i have assigned one BOM to the WBS activity component.

2.Then i right click on the BOM component and selected Explode Bom.

3. On the pop-up screen i have selected the Bom material and click on copy.

4.Then i save it.

Still the header material item category didn't change to 'T' Text.

 

If any solutions. Kindly let me know.

DRAF->READ OK

READ->DRAF OK

DRAF->CANC KO

entry.title: Re: Exposed SAP S/4HANA Federated content in SAP Workzone...
entry.content: What is the virtual hostname in the cloud connector? For webgui and wda this should be the same as the physical hostname

entry.title: SAP Sales and Service Cloud / Cloud for Customer – 2411 Release Briefing Webcast
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Save the Date!  Tuesday, October 22, 2024.  We are happy to announce our upcoming 2411 release webcast for SAP Sales and Service Cloud (Cloud for Customer).  We will be adding the release webcast-related information and assets here in our community. This will allow you to access the on-demand recording after the live event, short demos if available, slide deck, and also keep the conversation alive.

SAP Sales and Service Cloud / Cloud for Customer – 2411 Release Briefing Webcast

  • When: Tuesday, October 22, 2024 @ 4:00 – 5:00 pm CEST/ 10:00am -11:00 am EDT
  • Who: Presented by Emmanuel Desert and Sales & Service Cloud Product Managers
  • What: Join us for an insightful preview of the planned innovations for the upcoming November 2024 (2411) Release of SAP Sales & Service Cloud. We will talk about highlights in Platform & Integration for SAP Sales and Service Cloud.

Visit the documentation page to check out the current updates.
Please bookmark our 2024 release schedule located here.

entry.title: Re: Create CDS Entity in system 2 based on table in system 1
entry.content:
Hi @nagaraosunkara 

You can resolve your issue by creating a custom table, where the data will be populated by a job scheduling (how to create you can find here) that will perform the following logic:

1 Read data from system 1;
2 Populate the custom table in system 2;

Set the job to trigger at an interval, for example, every 1 minute.

After that, create an CDS based on the custom table.

I hope this helps.

BR,
Oleg

entry.title: Re: Batch determination suggests same batch without reducing available quantity

entry.title: Re: Batch determination suggests same batch without reducing available quantity

entry.title: Select sales email template from an email activity on lead using SDK (PDI)
entry.content:
Dear SAP gurus,

We have created some sales email templates to use on the different emails generated from Leads. Doing it manually has no problem since we can select our email template when creating an email activity from lead. But there are some emails activities that are auto generated via SDK and we'd like to be able to select also an email template from SDK and assign to our email activity object.

Do you know how can we accomplish this? I've attached a gif just in case you can watch how the manual scenario is and how can we accomplish the same using SDK

Thanks in advance and kind regards,

Marcelo

entry.title: How to convert Text to numeric format in Webi when I have source as BW/HANA and running month
entry.content:
Hi Everyone 
As per my requirement need to convert Text format to Number format 

Scenario: I would like to make the following note: I have an OCALMONTH object from the source system BW with a numerical data type. The output on the Webi presentation layer will be OCT2024 07 (MonthYear date).

Expected: OCT2024 07 as a 072024 07 

Scenario 2: Let's make sure to add column headers for the next 24 months, as mentioned above.ned above. output of scenario 1
Output : 

072024 -07082024 -07092024 -07

entry.title: Re: Hierarchy Type FSV not available in Global Hierarchies
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Different server groups for different queues in SMQR
entry.content:
Is it possible to assign different server groups for different inbound qRFC queues in SMQR (instead of one for all)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Different server groups for different queues in SMQR
entry.content:
Hello,

According to SAP Note 2255373 it is possible to achieve this using the "Destination with LOGON Data" column in SMQR transaction.

Refer to SAP Note 2255373 - XI runtime:  XI message is not processed on logon server/host.

With best regards.

entry.title: SAP Business One Sales Blanket Agreement
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am new to SAP Business One here and I am working on the Sales Blanket Agreement part.

I followed this blanket agreement official document,

https://help.sap.com/doc/011000358700000062952014e/9.0/en-US/HowTo_BlanketAgree_90.pdf

 

it says when the status "for the sales blanket agreement is On Hold, only those rows with no linked documents can be updated".

While in the SAP hana version SAP Business One, (version 10.00.191), I created a sales blanket agreement, the status is Approved. I created 1 sales order and 1 delivery based on this sales blanket agreement.

 

the relationship map is attached below (2 sales order are copied from this blanket agreement)

After this, I changed the status of this sales blanket agreement to On Hold, and uncheck the Set as Default checkbox. The row details can be modifed again ( with documents already linked to this row)

 

Could you please help me to check this problem? ( I suppose it should not be managed to modified)

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Unable to Retrieve Organization Secret and User Secre...
entry.content:
Hello colleague,

The same thing happened to me, until 1 month ago I had both the organisation secret and a user secret that was visible.

I'll tell you how to solve it in the following steps, create the instance to the app you need, make any type of request in my case the GET.

From there you can get the connection data: organisation secret, user secret and user secret. I hope this helps.

Let me know if it works for you.

greetings

entry.title: Re: From ECC to S/4HANA Public Cloud Refactor (“Re-architect”)
entry.content:
In your situation I would do the following:

  1. Analyze usage of custom code.
  2. Replace custom code with standard (Fit-to-standard).
  3. Investigate if and which Low-Code/No-Code tools can be used:
    1. Key user extensibility
    2. SAP Build Apps
    3. SAP Build Process Automation
  4. For the remaining gaps, investigate which option for developer extensibility is the right one:
    1. On-stack
    2. Side-by-side

Some important advantage of using RAP / ABAP Cloud:
Can be used for on-stack and side-by-side extensions. CAP is only available for side-by-side extensions.

Some further reading:

  • ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your ... - SAP Community
  • SAP S/4HANA Extensibility – Simplified Guide for B... - SAP Community
  • Extend SAP S/4HANA in the cloud and on premise with ABAP based extensions
  • RAP vs CAP - Key Differences between the Two Progr... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft PowerPoint
entry.content:
Hi @Ashok_R, I got IT to deploy the add-in for us today and had a look. Essentially the feature can be described as follows: The add-in accesses a SAC dashboard, renders a widget and copies a screenshot of the rendered widget onto a PowerPoint slide. It's a neat feature that could work well in hybrid scenarios where a client has a comprehensive management deck in PowerPoint that you haven't fully automated yet.

First, I did notice today that I'm unable to refresh any widget though. When I look into the add-in, all buttons - Sign Out, Add Widget, Refresh Data - are greyed out. Sign In is active and opens the add-in. Help and About are also active. Is this a bug or am I missing a configuration somewhere? This issue is present in both PowerPoint Desktop as well as PowerPoint web on the latest Chrome browser.

Second, is there any roadmap or list of planned features for future versions of the add-in? I saw in your comments that you guys are working on a bunch of things - that's great but a roadmap would really help us reassure and guide clients even better.

Thanks,

sekhar

entry.title: Re: Local consumption of business event in S/4HANA ABAP c...
entry.content:
Hello,

  1. yes events are based on RAP business objects.
  2. The corresponding behavior definition can be found using the SAP Object Type (SOT), which is the third last segment of the event type. The SOT is a development object which can be opened with ABAP Development Tools (ADT). Then the relation explorer will provide the desired information.

entry.title: 分类账视图与分录视图为何不同?
entry.content:
我使用APP【创建销项发票】产生图一分录

但我发现【分类账视图】与【分录视图】显示的结果不一样，差别在于总账科目11810000在【分类账视图】中被自动拆分成两的项目，第一个项目对应的利润中心为B001；第二个项目对应的利润中心为C000
看起来是根据贷方科目的利润中心进行拆分


请问是否有设定可以调整成不要自动根据利润中心拆分11810000的金额?


SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ Technical & Development Info Questions ?!
entry.content:
Hello Amgad,

Hope you are doing great.

  1. How many Scripting Languages can be used in SAP CPQ Workbench Script ?
    CPQ currently Supports Iron Python only for scripting
  2. Where can i find the documentation For Scripting Functions & APIs ?
    For Scripting:CPQ Scripting Documentation (sap.com), Scripting , Scripting General Guidelines
    For API: SAP CPQ API 
  3. I found alot of Stuff Regarding XML & Java Script being used as customizing option for SAP CPQ, where can i find more details about technical & Development on SAP CPQ In general and in details ?
    Responsive Templates (Quote 2.0), Responsive Templates (Quote 1.0)
  4. Where can i find the Elements of Context Class in python script?
    In above shared scripting documentation you will find more information on this topic.
  5. Can i nest Quotation Table loops or any kind of loop or not ?
    It is possible to nest, but it must be considered Timeouts when creating scripts and customizations.

entry.title: Where do we configure SAP FSM Item types?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could someone please guide me on where to configure item types in SAP FSM? I am unable to find the option under settings and configurations. I can see the option for item groups but not for item type configuration.

Your assistance would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,
Srinivasa

entry.title: Localization in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
SAP is well-known for its best practices, and for S/4HANA Public Cloud customers, this comes with the benefit of pre-configured settings that allow for running business transactions across various lines of business. As businesses expand globally, it becomes increasingly important for Cloud ERP solutions to meet the specific business and legal requirements of different countries and regions.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition offers a comprehensive list of countries/regions with specific functions in addition to general lines of business functionalities. Last time I checked, there are 59 out of box localized country/region versions. The latest updates to the country/region list can be found on the SAP Help Portal.

For customers participating in early adopter programs, the Configuration Localization Tool (CLT) from SAP Central Business Configuration allows for copying Germany as a template to about 160 countries that are not part of SAP delivered local versions. You can find the latest information in SAP note. 

Moreover, the Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/⁠4HANA Cloud provides tools and frameworks that enable the extension of country/region-specific functions for SAP-delivered local versions and customer own local versions.  Customers can extend their SAP S/⁠4HANA Cloud system using key user extensibility, side-by-side extensibility, and developer extensibility, including the multi-off-delivery option.

The Activate roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (3-system landscape) includes a dedicated Localization tag to provide an end-to-end view of the topic. This encompasses selecting countries/regions scope during Digital Discovery Assessment in Discover phase, self-enabling of SAP delivered local versions, configuration tool and modern extension capability during the Prepare phase, and capturing countries/regions specific requirements for configuration setting adjustments and extension developments during the Explore phase. And, in the Realize phase of the project, use SAP Central Business Configuration to set up new countries/regions, and leverage Localization as Self Service, including both CLT and extensibility capabilities, to further extend and adapt. 

In conclusion, SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud offers a comprehensive and flexible solution for businesses operating globally, ensuring compliance with specific country and region requirements while also providing the tools for further adaptation and extension.

Stay tuned for more updates and blogs.

Follow the SAP Activate page on the SAP Community. Remember to turn on your notification to receive updates or information about items requiring your attention. To enable notifications, follow the steps on the SAP Community Resources page.

SAP Activate Minute

Tune into the SAP Activate Minute videos in our Playlist here. Subscribe to get notified when we drop new videos. Here is the one for Localization.

entry.title: New member
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Brandi, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I am currently living in Lawrenceville, Georgia, and I am looking forward to visiting the Atlanta office. My career has been primarily in Healthcare working as a Business Analyst and a project lead. I am very excited to take my first step into the tech world. I have been exposed to a lot from the companies I have worked for but have never really gained the fundamentals to become an expert. Moving into tech has been something I have wanted to do for years, but would always stumble on where to start. So here I am!

I’m currently working towards my SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with the Vower learning group, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in finance and consumer industries.

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because it will make me more marketable and I am looking to pivot my career and become knowledgeable on a system I know is used everywhere.

I’m also open to connecting with others who are interested in technology and any other related topics as well.

 

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

 

Best regards,  

Brandi

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to add new Additional Product Data tag...
entry.content:
Hey Amy, Eric here from CPQ Support team!

Unfortunately, in the current version of CPQ, there is no option that allows for the addition of extra fields in the "Additional Product Data" section.

I would suggest raising an enhancement request in the customer influence portal (https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2671). This is the best way to bring attention to this issue and potentially have it addressed in future updates.

I hope this helps, kind regards!

entry.title: Re: How to convert Text to numeric format in Webi when I...
Re: How to convert Text to numeric format in Webi when I...
entry.content:
Your question is not clear enough.

Need OCT2024 07 to become 102024 07?  (since October is 10 not 07)

please create a customer incident for this bug on component BC-ESI-RAP-GNT.
System access will be necessary to analyze why the put operation is failing
in your system.

Kind regards
Andre
SAP Development Support

entry.title: No Where-Used List for the Authorization Object in SE80/SU21 after S/4 HANA 2023 Upgrade
entry.content:
After the system upgrade from S/4 HANA 2021 to S/4 HANA 2023, the Where-Used List for authorization objects in SE80/SU21 disappeared.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No Where-Used List for the Authorization Object in SE...
entry.content:
Due to certain restriction with the Where-Used List, as it requires a number of special search areas that are not available in the standard where-used list, this function was moved to the tool bar of transaction SE80/SU21.

In earlier version of the system, the Where-used List can be found under Additional information.

In the newer releases, you can use the new buttons 'Customizing Objects' and 'Development Objects', thy provide the same functions as the older version with new functionalities as well.

'Customizing Objects' can perform the same functions as the previous Where-used List while 'Development Objects' will ran a background job with the determined filters for the authorization object selected.
